scope.strategy: Build the world's most comprehensive source-backed Anopheles intelligence system, surpassing the current Aedes dataset in depth, breadth, provenance, and usefulness.
scope.completion_bar: Anopheles is not complete until source-map entries, receipts, SQLite records, answer routing, wiki pages, and a realistic production-path eval prove normal Codex answers are accurate, source-backed, and under 60 seconds.

domains.target_state: Authoritative taxonomy, synonymy, species-complex membership, vector status, and common-name records for the Anopheles gambiae complex, An. coluzzii, An. funestus, An. stephensi, and other major regional malaria vectors.
current_evidence: Bounded GBIF species-match records for twenty priority Anopheles taxa with exact raw-response provenance and accepted taxon keys.
required_next_sources: Catalogue of Life taxonomy and synonym records for target Anopheles taxa
NCBI Taxonomy records for target Anopheles taxa
VectorBase or VEuPathDB species and strain authority pages
Malaria Atlas Project and WHO vector-species context pages
completion_evidence: species and complex questions answer with exact authority provenance and synonym boundaries

domains.target_state: Comprehensive Anopheles literature metadata, abstracts, legal full text when available, supplement audits, parsed tables, and explicit blocked-source gaps.
current_evidence: 3,457 bounded historical-to-current OpenAlex work records across twenty priority species, the Gambiae complex, and thirteen R&D topics, plus explicit per-work metadata and enrichment gaps. Records preserve title, abstract when supplied, topic search context, source URL, and exact saved raw-page locator.
required_next_sources: deeper OpenAlex Anopheles literature corpus with strict target-taxon materiality review
PubMed Anopheles host-seeking, olfaction, repellency, resistance, and vector-competence audits
Crossref publisher metadata reconciliation
Europe PMC, Unpaywall, PMC Open Access, and legal full-text units
per-paper supplement audit atoms and parsed supported supplement rows
completion_evidence: paper questions distinguish metadata, legal full text, parsed supplement rows, and source gaps

domains.target_state: Global Anopheles occurrence, collection, abundance, country, seasonality, trap, and surveillance records with date, place, method, certainty, taxon, and provenance.
current_evidence: Bounded GBIF occurrence records for twenty priority Anopheles taxa with event date, place fields when supplied, dataset identity, license, and exact occurrence/raw-page locators.
required_next_sources: complete paged GBIF occurrence records and deduplicated range summaries for target Anopheles taxa
VectorBase population and sample metadata where public
VectorByte or VecDyn abundance datasets for Anopheles
Malaria Atlas Project vector occurrence or suitability resources where public
VectorNet and national surveillance exports where public
completion_evidence: country, date, abundance, and source-specific questions answer with row provenance

domains.target_state: Habitat, larval ecology, climate suitability, seasonality, vector range, indoor/outdoor biting context, resting behavior, and ecological interaction records.
required_next_sources: WorldClim-linked occurrence joins for target Anopheles taxa
Malaria Atlas Project vector suitability and range layers where public
VectorByte traits and ecology datasets
literature-derived habitat, resting, feeding, and seasonality facets
completion_evidence: ecology answers separate observation rows, modeled suitability, literature summaries, and public-health inference

domains.target_state: Host seeking, blood feeding, landing, probing, oviposition, mating, swarming, resting, flight, larval, circadian, and intervention-response behavior records.
required_next_sources: Dryad, Zenodo, Figshare, OSF, Mendeley, and PMC supplementary Anopheles behavior datasets and videos
literature-derived behavior facets with assay, stimulus, sex, age, strain, endpoint, and context fields
repellent and spatial-repellent assay datasets for Anopheles
decoded trajectory, landing, probing, biting, oviposition, and swarming tables where public
completion_evidence: behavior answers preserve endpoint differences instead of collapsing approach, landing, probing, feeding, and mortality

domains.target_state: Odor, heat, CO2, humidity, visual, auditory, gustatory, antennal, receptor, and host-cue evidence tied to Anopheles behavior and repellent discovery.
required_next_sources: PubMed/OpenAlex Anopheles olfaction and sensory audit
VectorBase receptor gene and protein records
UniProt receptor and sensory protein metadata
functional receptor, antennal, and behavior assay tables from legal full text and supplements
completion_evidence: sensory answers separate receptor expression, ligand response, neural response, and behavioral causality

domains.target_state: Brain, neuron, sensory circuit, atlas, single-cell, SRA workflow, and connectome/source-gap records for Anopheles.
required_next_sources: public Anopheles brain, single-cell, and sensory-neuron datasets
GEO and SRA neurobiology metadata
Mosquito Cell Atlas or related cross-mosquito resources where Anopheles rows exist
explicit public connectome gap records if no complete whole-brain bulk package exists
completion_evidence: neurobiology answers distinguish direct Anopheles evidence from cross-species Aedes inference

domains.target_state: Reference assemblies, genes, transcripts, proteins, orthology, gene families, gene IDs, sequence metadata, and genome-feature records for target Anopheles species.
current_evidence: Bounded UniProtKB protein and proteome records for eight priority Anopheles taxa, using NCBI-verified taxonomy identifiers and preserving exact raw API result locators.

Bounded NCBI Assembly searches for twenty priority Anopheles taxa, preserving 122 returned assemblies plus explicit zero-result gaps, with accession, assembly level, BioProject, BioSample, release date, quality fields, download paths, and exact raw ESummary locators.

Assembly-scoped parsing of thirteen reference genomes: Anopheles gambiae, stephensi, coluzzii, funestus, arabiensis, minimus, sinensis, albimanus, darlingi, aquasalis, merus, nili, and moucheti. The 1,427,103-record lane contains genes, transcripts, functional features, proteins, GO assertions, available expression profiles, and explicit per-assembly file gaps with exact provenance.
required_next_sources: VectorBase or VEuPathDB Anopheles reference genome packages
NCBI or VectorBase annotations for Dirus, Culicifacies, Melas, Atroparvus, Labranchiae, Sacharovi, and Freeborni where exact NCBI reference files are absent or unusable
BOLD DNA barcode records
OrthoMCL or equivalent orthology and current-ID resources
completion_evidence: gene, protein, orthology, barcode, and assembly questions answer with exact row or file locators

domains.target_state: Expression, RNA-seq, single-cell, strain, BioSample, SRA, population genomics, variant, introgression, and adaptation records for Anopheles.
current_evidence: 2,688 bounded accession-level NCBI BioSample records across twenty priority Anopheles taxa, plus explicit gaps, with exact raw ESummary locators, parsed sample attributes, linked SRA identifiers when present, and per-taxon receipt counts.
Bounded NCBI SRA experiment searches parsed to atomic run records with BioProject, BioSample, platform, library metadata, spots, bases, size, and exact raw run locators when supplied.
83,725 parsed NCBI expression profiles across assemblies where NCBI supplies raw and normalized count tables, with exact source-file line locators and underlying sample-by-gene values preserved.
required_next_sources: GEO expression and RNA-seq metadata
Ag1000G or MalariaGEN public Anopheles population-genomics releases where licensing permits
dbSNP or ENA/EBI variation resources and explicit no-record gaps where applicable
completion_evidence: population and expression answers distinguish sample metadata, raw reads, computed matrices, and variant calls

domains.target_state: Microbiome, symbiont, Plasmodium interaction, vector-pathogen, Wolbachia or paratransgenesis, and pathogen identity records.
current_evidence: Ten NCBI Taxonomy identity anchors cover major human and laboratory Plasmodium species, with exact taxon IDs and raw-summary locators. These records explicitly do not claim vector competence or transmission.
required_next_sources: NCBI Taxonomy anchors for additional Anopheles-relevant pathogens where justified by direct evidence
literature-derived microbiome and symbiont facets
VectorBase or public pathway and host-pathogen interaction metadata
public intervention datasets for symbiont or microbiome approaches
completion_evidence: answers separate mosquito microbiome, parasite development, transmission, and intervention evidence

domains.target_state: Assay-level Anopheles vector-competence records for Plasmodium species and relevant pathogens, preserving infection, dissemination, transmission, tissue, strain, population, timepoint, temperature, and provenance.
current_evidence: 90 conservative abstract-level numeric endpoint records derived from 3,457 real Anopheles OpenAlex works: 34 field-surveillance results, 3 controlled experimental results, and 53 abstract-reported results whose study setting was not explicit enough for a stronger classification. Every row preserves the exact result sentence, original work ID and title, original raw OpenAlex locator, named target species, named Plasmodium species where present, endpoint labels, and numeric strings. Modeled projections and methods-only numeric sentences are excluded. Results are not yet validated against full-text tables.
required_next_sources: parsed supplement tables for infection, oocyst, sporozoite, transmission, and parasite-load endpoints
strain and mosquito-population metadata linked to each extracted competence assay
human validation of abstract extractions against methods and full-text result tables
completion_evidence: vector competence answers preserve species, parasite, assay endpoint, and experimental context

domains.target_state: Insecticide resistance, kdr, metabolic resistance, behavioral resistance, ITN/IRS response, larval control, gene drive, sterile/incompatible insect, and control-method records.
current_evidence: Paged WHO MAL_THREATS malaria-vector resistance rows filtered to Anopheles species labels, with assay, insecticide, mortality, status, mechanism, place, time, citation, and exact raw response row provenance when supplied.
required_next_sources: IR Mapper or equivalent Anopheles resistance records where public
WHO malaria vector-control and resistance guidance
literature-derived resistance markers and parsed resistance supplement rows
completion_evidence: resistance answers preserve phenotype, mechanism, insecticide class, geography, time, method, and source

domains.target_state: Topical repellent, spatial repellent, bite-prevention, landing-inhibition, feeding-inhibition, attractant, odor-masking, and product-discovery evidence for Anopheles.
required_next_sources: Anopheles-specific repellent literature and datasets
mosquito repellent literature records tagged to Anopheles species and endpoints
WHO and EPA human-repellent testing guidance connected to Anopheles endpoints
patent, preprint, dataset, and blocked-source discovery gap records
completion_evidence: repellent answers keep topical, spatial, contact, non-contact, landing, probing, feeding, and mortality endpoints separate

domains.target_state: Official WHO, CDC, ECDC, PMI, Malaria Atlas Project, national-malaria-program, and malaria surveillance guidance tied to Anopheles biology and intervention context.
required_next_sources: WHO malaria vector-control guidance and reports
CDC malaria and Anopheles pages
Malaria Atlas Project public pages and dataset metadata
national or regional surveillance exports where public and machine-readable
completion_evidence: public-health answers distinguish guidance, surveillance, model outputs, and vector biology

domains.target_state: Licensed Anopheles still images, public videos, keyframes, media locators, labels, checksums, metadata, and explicit media gaps.
required_next_sources: iNaturalist and GBIF media records for target Anopheles taxa
Mosquito Alert or regional media records where Anopheles is represented
PMC, Dryad, Zenodo, Figshare, OSF, and Mendeley Anopheles video/media manifests
bounded licensed image mirrors, video probes, previews, frame manifests, and media gap records
completion_evidence: media answers include source URL, license, taxon, observation or dataset context, and inspectable locator

domains.target_state: A realistic black-box Anopheles production-path evaluation through Josh's normal Codex route, with accurate source-backed answers under 60 seconds.
required_next_sources: 50-question Anopheles Reality Eval covering biology, behavior, repellents, resistance, surveillance, genomics, ecology, media, and source gaps
independent grading with exact provenance checks and latency measurements
recorded Codex app demo after the eval passes
completion_evidence: all eval questions pass accuracy, source, usefulness, privacy, provenance, and under-60-second latency gates
